heading: Subpoenas to officers or members of crew
label: 31110 Subpoenas to officers or members of crew
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3111046 App.:784., .Mar. 3, 1925, ch. 428, § 443 Stat. 1112
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3111046 App.:784., .Mar. 3, 1925, ch. 428, § 443 Stat. 1112

children.text: the Secretary of the department or the head of the independent establishment having control of the vessel at the time the cause of action arose; or
the master or commanding officer of the vessel at the time the subpoena is issued.
